privileged_info_summary: The task involves consolidating two synthetic Meridian company records in Odoo: primary record 'Meridian Solutions Grp' and duplicate 'Meridian Solutions Group'. Three contacts (Amanda Cortez, Ben Holloway, Celia Park) must be moved from the duplicate to primary; two already exist on primary (David Osei, Eva Lindqvist). Three opportunities must be consolidated: Meridian ERP Phase 1 ($65k), Meridian Security Audit ($28k), and Meridian Annual License ($42k). Success requires archiving the duplicate, removing the 'Requires-Deduplication' tag from primary, adding a consolidation note to primary, and tagging all 3 opportunities with 'Account-Deduped'. Pass threshold is 60 points out of 100.
